---
title: "Matching Markets"
short-title: "Matching"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Gale-Shapley deferred acceptance, kidney exchange, and stable matching in R."
keywords: ["matching", "Gale-Shapley", "stable matching", "kidney exchange"]
---

# Matching Markets {#sec-matching-markets}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
